title: Pioneer Opus Quad DJ CONTROLLER
description: This datapack adds the Pioneer Opus Quad to minecraft as a new decorative block! No resources pack required, fully vanilla!
body:
This datapack adds the Pioneer Opus Quad to minecraft as a new decorative block!

It doesn't require any resources pack! It's fully multiplayer compatible, and is using vanilla features and custom textures out of custom heads and item displays.

To place it, simply write the following command based on the direction you want the dj controller to be facing:

/function opus_quad:create_facing_east
/function opus_quad:create_facing_south
/function opus_quad:create_facing_west
/function opus_quad:create_facing_north

To remove it, do /kill @e[​item_display,distance=0..5] whilst standing on the dj controller you want to delete.
